title: US, China reach deal to allow TikTok sale, Bessent says — with Trump and Xi set to ‘consummate’ agreement
description: The US and China have finalized a deal to transfer the American version of TikTok to new owners, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent revealed on Sunday.
keywords: Politics, US News, Business, china, scott bessent, TikTok, trump, xi jinping
snippet:
WASHINGTON — The US and China have finalized a deal to transfer TikTok to new owners, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent revealed on Sunday.
